commons.name: name
commons.what_would_you_like_to_do: What would you like to do?

consent_banner.line1: We and selected third parties use cookies or similar technologies for technical purposes and, with your consent, for measurement. Denying consent may make related features unavailable.
consent_banner.line2: You can freely give, deny, or withdraw your consent at any time.
consent_banner.line3: Use the 'Accept' button to consent to the use of such technologies. Use the 'Reject' button or close this notice to continue without accepting.

settings_modal.AUTH_SESSION_description: Stores user login and session data.
settings_modal._ga_description: Used by Google Analytics to collect data on the number of times a user has visited the website as well as dates for the first and most recent visit.
settings_modal.basic_interactions_description: These trackers are used for LEAF-Writer basic functionalities, which include inserting a user's identifier (e.g., Github account name or ORCID) in any Web Annotations that are created, and supporting loading, saving, and sharing files through a user's Git repositories. LEAF-Writer can only provide limited functionalities without these cookies.
settings_modal.cookie_usage_description: The following panel allows you to customize your consent preferences for the usage of cookies technology to help us achieve the features and activities described below. You may review and change your choices at any time. Please be aware that denying consent for a particular purpose may make related features unavailable. For more details relative to cookies and other sensitive data, please read the full.
settings_modal.lw_description: Stores usage data on the browser's local storage: preferred identity and storage providers, preferred language and colour theme, recent repositories and documents, XML schemas, etc.
settings_modal.measurement_description: These cookies collect information about how you use the website, which pages you visited and which links you clicked on. All the data is anonymized and cannot be used to identify you.
settings_modal.more_information_description: For any queries about our policy on cookies and your choices.
settings_modal.strictly_necessary_description: Necessary cookies help make a website usable by enabling basic functions like page navigation and access to secure areas of the website. The website cannot function properly without these cookies.

warning.must_accept_cookies_message: You must accept our cookie policies to be able to sign in. Click on the shield icon at the top.
warning.remove_consent_basic_interactions_messag: <0>Removing consent for</0> <1>basic interactions & functionalities</1> <2>will sign you out.</2>

error.message404: You either tried some shady route, or you came here by mistake. Go back to the <1>main page.</1>

home.subtitle: The XML & RDF online editor of the Linked Editing Academic Framework

messages.link_to_storage_provider_instructions: You can do that by clicking on the user icon in the top-right corner of the screen and then selecting an option in the list of storage providers.
messages.rotate_phone: Please rotate your phone or open LEAF-Writer on a large screen.
messages.service not available at the moment: Service not available at the moment
messages.you_must_sign_in_to_open_and_save_docume: You must sign in to open and save documents from the cloud
messages.you_must_sign_in_witn_a_storage_provider: You must sign in witn a storage provider to open and save document from the cloud

error.xml_not_well-formed_message: The document you are trying to upload is not well-formed. Check that it has the XML extension and follows the correct XML grammar.

warning.storage_provider_invalid: provider '{{provider}}' is invalid or not a supported

storage.you_will_lose_any_unsaved_changes: You will lose any unsaved changes
